data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written and RED confirmed. 3 new test functions (test_flock_stage_commit_writes_file, test_flock_stage_commit_commits_to_branch, test_flock_stage_commit_fails_gracefully_on_missing_tracker) all fail with '_flock_stage_commit function exists: expected=defined actual=undefined'. Regression test (test_write_commit_event_regression_after_extraction) passes. Existing 8 tests remain GREEN. Total: PASSED 21, FAILED 3.
